name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [proc |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ proc' = (proc % N) + 1
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "idle"]
        \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "critical"]
        \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "trying"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<proc, state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, votes, state


Init == /\ participants = 1..N
       /\ coordinator = 0
       /\ votes = [i \in participants |-> "unknown"]
       /\ state = "init"

Next == \/ /\ state = "init"
          /\ state' = "prepare"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, votes>>
       \/ /\ state = "prepare"
          /\ state' = "vote"
          /\ votes' = [i \in participants |-> IF i \in 1..N THEN "yes" ELSE "no"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state>>
       \/ /\ state = "vote"
          /\ state' = "commit"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, votes>>
       \/ /\ state = "commit"
          /\ state' = "done"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, votes>>
       \/ /\ state = "done"
          /\ state' = "done"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, votes>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, votes, state>>
====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices 1..N. A fork is free if its index is in forks. *)

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating". *)

Init == forks = 1..N /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

CanEat(i) == LeftFork(i) \in forks /\ RightFork(i) \in forks

Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "hungry" /\ CanEat(i) /\ forks' = forks \ {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "eating" /\ forks' = forks \cup {LeftFork(i), RightFork(i)}
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = "thinking" /\ forks' = forks
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

TakeTicket(i) == /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
                /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Enter(i) == /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Leave(i) == /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Critical(i) == /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N: Critical(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
          /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
          /\ size' = size + 1
          /\ head' = head
          /\ q' = q
       \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
        \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
        \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, localState, outgoingMessages, state


(* --algorithm ChandyLamportSnapshot
    /\ state[i] = "UNRECORDED"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

  SendMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
    /\ outgoingMessages' = [outgoingMessages EXCEPT !i..j = Append(outgoingMessagesi..j, "MARKER")]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages>>

  ReceiveMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
    /\ incomingMessagesi..j = "MARKER" \cat incomingMessagesi..j
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT !i..j = incomingMessagesi..j]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, outgoingMessages>>

  ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) == 
    /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
    /\ incomingMessagesi..j = msg \cat incomingMessagesi..j
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, outgoingMessages>>

  FinishRecording(i) == 
    /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : incomingMessagesi..j = <<>>
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING_DONE"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

  FinishAll == 
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "RECORDING_DONE"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>
*)
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "UNRECORDED"]
  /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
  /\ incomingMessages = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
  /\ outgoingMessages = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]

RecordState(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "UNRECORDED"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING"]
  /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

SendMarker(i, j) == 
  /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
  /\ outgoingMessages' = [outgoingMessages EXCEPT !i..j = Append(outgoingMessagesi..j, "MARKER")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages>>

ReceiveMarker(i, j) == 
  /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
  /\ incomingMessagesi..j = "MARKER" \cat incomingMessagesi..j
  /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT !i..j = incomingMessagesi..j]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, outgoingMessages>>

ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) == 
  /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
  /\ incomingMessagesi..j = msg \cat incomingMessagesi..j
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, outgoingMessages>>

FinishRecording(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "RECORDING"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : incomingMessagesi..j = <<>>
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "RECORDING_DONE"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

FinishAll == 
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "RECORDING_DONE"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : RecordState(i)
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : SendMarker(i, j)
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N : ReceiveMarker(i, j)
  \/ \E i, j \in 1..N, msg \in Nat : ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : FinishRecording(i)
  \/ FinishAll

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>> /\ <>[][FinishAll]_<<state, localState, channelState, incomingMessages, outgoingMessages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}  \* finite set of keys
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"} \* finite set of values

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ k \in Keys
        /\ v \in Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] /\
          chosen \in V

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\
        proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\
        chosen = 0

Prepare(p, b) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> proposers[p].value]]
                 /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF acceptors[i].ballot < b THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> acceptors[i].value] ELSE acceptors[i]]

Accept(p, b, v) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
                 /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF acceptors[i].ballot <= b THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> v] ELSE acceptors[i]]

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = v
           /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> acceptors[i].ballot, value |-> v]]
           /\ proposers' = proposers

Next == \/ /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : /\ proposers[p].ballot = 0 /\ proposers[p].value \in V
                 /\ Prepare(p, b)
           \/ /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : /\ proposers[p].ballot = b /\ proposers[p].value \in V
                 /\ Accept(p, b, proposers[p].value)
           \/ /\ \E v \in V : /\ chosen = 0 /\ \E p \in 1..M : proposers[p].value = v
                 /\ Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Len(File) \div ChunkSize -> 0..MaxRetries]

Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Len(File) \div ChunkSize |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Len(File) \div ChunkSize
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED ackedChunks

AckChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED sentChunks
    /\ UNCHANGED retransmitCount

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MaxRetries
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED sentChunks
    /\ UNCHANGED ackedChunks

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(File) \div ChunkSize : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : AckChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : RetransmitChunk(i)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>> /\ TypeOK

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, avg


      for i \in 1..N do

      od;

      (* Exchange clock values *)
      for i \in 1..N do

      od;

      (* Synchronise *)

      for i \in 1..N do

      od;

      (* Reset offsets *)
      for i \in 1..N do

      od;


end; *)

(* Parameters *)
CONSTANT N, maxDrift, epsilon

(* Helper functions *)
Avg(c) == Sum(c) \div Len(c)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + Random(-maxDrift, maxDrift)]
        /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ avg' = Avg(clocks')
        /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg']
        /\ offsets' = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Invariant: all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLE flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = flag[2]]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = flag[1]]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = flag[2]]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = flag[1]]
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, T

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j \in 1..N : infected[j]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => known'[j] = known[j] /\ infected'[j] = infected[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ infected \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == 
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in free :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in allocated[c] :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
        /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId

Init == 
  subscribers = << >> /\ 
  messages = << >> /\ 
  nextMsgId = 0

Next == 
  subscribers' = subscribers /\ 
  messages' = messages /\ 
  nextMsgId' = nextMsgId

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == 
  /\ turn = P1
  /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
     /\ wants[2] = FALSE
     /\ turn' = turn
     /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
     /\ wants[2] = FALSE
     /\ turn' = P1
     /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
     /\ wants[2] = TRUE
     /\ turn' = P2
     /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
  \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
     /\ wants[2] = TRUE
     /\ turn' = turn
     /\ wants' = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ turn \in {P1, P2}
  /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>}

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node : \E v \in Nat :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = v]
          /\ v >= counts[n][m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

====
